title: Batch Yield Calculator Schema
description: Schema for recipe and batch inputs and yield-related outputs (servings, containers, inventory deltas, labels, and per-portion nutrition) for the Batch Yield Calculator in Suka Smart Assistant.

input.description: Inputs describing the recipe, desired batch scale, portioning preferences, containers, and storehouse context.

unitSystem.description: Preferred unit system for weight and volume calculations.

recipeDefinition.description: Base recipe definition as stored in the Recipe Vault or imported from a source.

recipeId.description: Stable ID of the recipe in the Recipe Vault or import registry.

baseYield.description: Original recipe yield description, used as the scaling reference.

servings.description: Number of servings the base recipe is written for.

servingSizeGrams.description: Approximate grams per serving in the base recipe, if known.

panSizeDescriptor.description: Optional description of pan or tray size used in the base recipe (for casseroles, sheet pans, etc.).

ingredients.description: List of ingredients for the base recipe, each with quantity, unit, and optional link to storehouse inventory.

lineId.description: Stable local ID for this ingredient line.

name.description: Ingredient name as shown to the user.

unit.description: Unit of measure for the ingredient (g, oz, cup, tbsp, ml, etc.).

inventoryItemId.description: Optional ID mapping this ingredient to a storehouse inventory item.

batchScalingTarget.description: Target describing how large the batch should be compared to the base recipe.

mode.description: Scaling mode: desired servings, desired containers, or direct scale factor.

targetServings.description: Desired total number of servings when mode is 'servings'.

targetContainers.description: Desired containers and counts when mode is 'containers'.

containerTypeId.description: ID of the container type (e.g., quart jar, half-pan).

count.description: Number of containers to fill of this type.

scaleFactor.description: Multiplier applied to the base recipe (e.g., 2 for double batch) when mode is 'scaleFactor'.

portioningPreferences.description: Household-level preferences that influence portion sizing and distribution.

defaultServingSizeGrams.description: Preferred serving size in grams for the household.

childServingFraction.description: Fraction of an adult serving for children (e.g., 0.5 for half portions).

elderServingFraction.description: Fraction of an adult serving for elders.

portionDistribution.description: Optional distribution of portions between ready-to-eat and preserved.

readyToEatServings.description: Desired servings set aside for immediate or near-term eating.

preservedServings.description: Desired servings to be placed into containers and stored in the storehouse.

containerCatalog.description: Available containers the household has on hand for this batch.

containerTypeId.description: ID of this container type (used in mappings and session planners).

label.description: Human-readable label, such as 'Quart Jar' or '9x13 Pan'.

approxFoodWeightGrams.description: Approximate weight of food in grams when filled to the typical level.

maxFillFraction.description: Maximum fraction to fill this container for safety or quality (e.g., 0.9).

preferredPreservationMethod.description: Default or likely preservation method when this container is used (e.g., 'freezer', 'water-bath', 'pressure-can').

storehouseInventorySnapshot.description: Snapshot of relevant storehouse inventory items, used for ingredient availability and produced items.

items.description: Subset of inventory items relevant to this batch, usually linked to recipe ingredients.

inventoryItemId.description: ID of the storehouse inventory item.

unit.description: Unit for quantity (g, oz, lb, kg, each, etc.).

location.description: Storage location (pantry, freezer, root cellar, etc.).

macroTargets.description: Optional macro-nutrient targets used for per-portion nutrition hints.

caloriesPerDay.description: Target calories per day for the person or household average.

hairSupportTargets.description: Optional hair-supporting nutrient profile from the Black hair nutrition calculator.

hairSupportScoreTarget.description: Target score for hair-supporting nutrients for a typical day.

keyNutrients.description: List of priority nutrients to support hair health (e.g., protein, iron, zinc).

output.description: Outputs produced by the Batch Yield Calculator, used for planning, storehouse updates, and labels.

batchPortionYield.description: Normalized yield of the batch in servings and grams.

totalServings.description: Total computed servings for the full batch.

servingSizeGrams.description: Estimated grams per serving in the scaled batch.

readyToEatServings.description: Servings allocated for near-term or immediate consumption.

preservedServings.description: Servings allocated for preserved containers in the storehouse.

batchContainerPlan.description: Plan describing how the cooked batch is distributed into containers.

containerTypeId.description: ID of the container type (matching containerCatalog).

label.description: Human-friendly label for this container type.

count.description: Number of containers to be filled.

estimatedServingsPerContainer.description: Estimated servings contained in each unit of this container type.

fillFraction.description: Expected fill level relative to maximum safe volume.

preservationMethod.description: Planned method of preservation for this container group (freezer, root cellar, water-bath, pressure-can, etc.).

storageLocation.description: Where these containers will live (freezer, pantry, fridge, root cellar, etc.).

batchInventoryDelta.description: Inventory changes implied by the batch: ingredients consumed and preserved items created.

ingredientsConsumed.description: Inventory consumption lines for ingredients used in this batch.

inventoryItemId.description: ID of the consumed inventory item.

quantityChange.description: Negative quantity representing how much of the item is used.

itemsProduced.description: New or updated inventory items created by this batch (containers and preserved units).

inventoryItemId.description: ID for the resulting item (existing or to be created).

label.description: Friendly label for the preserved item.

unit.description: Unit for the quantity change (each, jar, pan, etc.).

location.description: Target storage location for this produced item.

batchLabelingHints.description: Convenience outputs for label printing and handwriting, including name, dates, and notes.

primaryLabel.description: Primary label line, usually the recipe or dish name.

secondaryLabel.description: Secondary label line, such as variant, spice profile, or diet tags.

preparedOn.description: Timestamp for when the batch is prepared or expected to be finished.

useByDate.description: Suggested 'use by' or 'best by' date based on preservation method and household rules.

labelLines.description: Pre-composed label lines ready to send to the label printer or write on tape.

notes.description: Free-text notes, including reheat instructions or serving suggestions.

batchNutritionPerPortion.description: Per-portion nutrition estimates for the scaled batch, used to connect with macro and hair nutrition targets.

hairSupportScorePerServing.description: Relative score indicating how supportive each serving is for hair-oriented nutrient targets.

flags.description: Optional flags or notes about how this batch aligns with macro and hair-support targets.
